<!-- What does this change and why? -->

Closes #<!-- issue number, if any -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New component / variant
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal

| Before | After |
|---|---|

## Checklist
- [ ] The package builds (`xcodebuild build -scheme Sumi-Package -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator'`)
- [ ] The **Demo** builds and I checked the change by eye
- [ ] Follows the conventions in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) — tokens (no colour/size literals), one product per component, iOS 13 fallback for any newer API
- [ ] No new build warnings
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]` (for user-facing changes)
